reviews.comment:
Muy buena estación de servicio, el precio del combustible al mismo precio que en la ciudad, reciben debito, QR, la confiteria también excelente, haaa una cosa muy importante podes calibrar los neumáticos ya que en casi todas las estaciones no los tienen en condiciones

(Translated by Google)
Very good gas station, fuel prices are the same as in the city, they accept debit and QR codes, the snack bar is also excellent, and one very important thing: you can get your tires inflated since almost all other stations don't have them properly inflated.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/8700140572418264453/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNOa3NPNHpBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Muy atentas las chicas del serviclub, unas pizas espectaculares. Y en la playa  muy buena atencion

(Translated by Google)
The girls at the service club were very attentive, and the pizzas were spectacular. And the service on the beach was excellent.
